Html: Can you provide me with an ECCN number of your softwares Tftpd32 and Tftpd64, which I can document in our OTS software description within SW design specification?

Since Tftpd32 have no encryption functionality, there is no export restriction regarding the US classification.
The corresponding EECN code is EAR99/NLR and CCATS code is not applicable (N/A).…
